body_html:
send to miles please

--- Greg Hernandez ghernandez@emgroup.net wrote:

We will not apply any markup to the landscaping
work. We will only invoice
for the time we have to devote to it, which should
not be much. Basically
some time for follow-ups and some assistance in the
purchasing and shipping
if needed.

I will contact Emad to obtain the plans.

The landing craft that we identified is in
Baltimore, Maryland. It is the
only one we have identified on the East and Gulf
Coasts and two other buyers
are also interested. Some of its data follows:

Length - 135 ft
Beam - 29 ft 9-1/8 in
Cargo space - 105 ft x 17 ft (at narrowest

point)
Cargo Capacity - 187 tons
Speed Fully Loaded - 11 knots
Price - $359,000

We recommend to go and inspect it. Based on the
information that the owner,
General Propulsion, LLC, provided it looks highly
appropriate for the
project needs. Can you send someone to check it and
test the engines, or
can you authorize us to do it?

On 1/16/06 7:51 PM, "J. Epstein"
jeeproject@yahoo.com wrote:

is your fee included in these wages... how long
would the pool take... please ask emad or miles
for
the hackel pool plans

--- Greg Hernandez ghernandez@emgroup.net wrote:

Jeff

Please see the attached documents.

Regards, Greg

jeeproject@yahoo.com wrote:

greg//// the proposal makes no sense... it
doesn't

all

even

an

estimate... GAbriel should come tto he isalnd
and

koi

birds

months

after signing a contract,,, i have yet to see

the
things you are working on...
